project_name: 元素崩壞：遺落的試煉地

core_principles.philosophy: Data-Driven (數據驅動), Modular Design (模組化設計)
core_principles.operation_style: Minimalist Linear Movement (極簡直線移動/前進與離開)
core_principles.loop: 探索/戰鬥 -> 資源獲取 -> 合成/強化 -> 職業轉職 -> 高難度挑戰

technical_stack.asset_strategy: AI Generated (DALL-E/ChatGPT for Art, Suno for BGM, Freesound for SFX)
technical_stack.data_format: JSON (for monsters, items, quests, and dialogue)

system_modules.movement: Progress-based pointer system, random encounter check per step.
system_modules.battle: Turn-based, first-person view, AGI-based action order.

automation_steps: Step 1: Define specific JSON data for all modules (monsters, items, etc.)
Step 2: Scripting detailed narrative events for each dungeon node
Step 3: Generate visual and audio assets using standardized prompts
Step 4: Python code integration (Engine logic + JSON loading)

future_expansion.genre_pivot: Survival Mode (convert stats to hunger/thirst/temp, dungeons to biomes)
